details.productUrlName: Daxos Blessed by the Sun Serial Numbered

customAttributes.description:
Daxos’s toughness is equal to your devotion to white. (Each W in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to white.)
Whenever another creature you control enters the battlefield or dies, you gain 1 life.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
